case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. VS DUBON, ANA M.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $749.58 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DUBON, ANA M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
